title: Cosmos Mono Synth — a classic monophonic subtractive synth keyboard that makes real sound via Web Audio
title_vi: Cosmos Mono Synth — đàn synth trừ đơn âm cổ điển, phát âm thật qua Web Audio
summary: A classic monophonic subtractive synthesizer on the Cosmos Phantom-dark theme, fully self-contained with zero dependencies. It has a 1.5-octave keyboard, a single oscillator (selectable saw or square) running through a resonant lowpass filter driven by an ADSR filter envelope, an LFO vibrato into pitch, and portamento that glides between successive notes; CUTOFF and RESO knobs shape the tone and a live scope draws the resulting waveform. It MAKES REAL SOUND via the Web Audio API: one persistent oscillator → biquad lowpass → VCA → master gain near 0.22 → compressor, with amp and filter envelopes ramped so notes never click, and an LFO modulating oscillator frequency for vibrato. Play the keys by clicking or with QWERTY (a,s,d,f… for white keys, w,e,t,y… for black keys); drag the knobs up and down to sweep cutoff and resonance; click SAW or SQUARE to switch the oscillator. Because browsers block autoplay, the AudioContext is created and resumed only on the first key press, click, or knob drag. For capture it ships a SILENT deterministic looping visual demo: a mulberry32-seeded minor-pentatonic riff plays itself — keys depress in sequence with portamento overlap, the cutoff glow sweeps across the panel and knob, and the scope wiggles with a harmonic count tied to the filter envelope — all a pure function of u so it loops seamlessly. Frame 0 sits mid-riff with a key down.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and click a key or press a key to HEAR it (audio needs a user gesture to start). HOW TO PLAY: white keys are a,s,d,f,g,h,j,k,l and the two keys right of it; black keys are w,e,t,y,u then o,p; or click any key. Drag the CUTOFF and RESO knobs up/down to sweep the filter; click SAW or SQUARE to pick the oscillator shape. KEY TECHNIQUES: a single persistent oscillator (saw or square) feeds a biquad lowpass whose frequency follows an ADSR envelope (40ms attack to a cutoff peak set by the knob, exponential decay to a sustain at 40% of peak) and whose Q is the resonance knob; a sine LFO (~5.2Hz) modulates oscillator frequency for vibrato; portamento is an exponentialRamp of osc.frequency over 70ms between notes; the amp VCA uses a linear attack/decay/release so it is click-free; master gain 0.22 + DynamicsCompressor protect the ears; pitch is base*2**(semitone/12) from C3. render(u) maps u to a 16-step seeded minor-pentatonic riff (offset +0.158 so frame 0 is mid-riff with a key down), drives the cutoff glow from the filter envelope + LFO, and draws the scope from a filtered saw/square whose harmonic count scales with the envelope — no Math.random() in render. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT (no AudioContext) + window.__seek(t) deterministic visual. TUNE: LOOP (tempo), the seeded RIFF, the +0.158 frame-0 offset, ADSR times and filter peak in noteOn(), LFO depth/rate, and the master gain.
summary_vi: Đàn synth trừ đơn âm cổ điển trên nền Phantom-dark của Cosmos, độc lập và không phụ thuộc thư viện. Có bàn phím 1.5 quãng tám, một oscillator (chọn saw/square) qua bộ lọc lowpass cộng hưởng điều khiển bởi envelope ADSR cho bộ lọc, LFO rung cao độ và portamento trượt giữa các nốt; núm CUTOFF và RESO chỉnh âm sắc, một scope vẽ dạng sóng. Nó PHÁT ÂM THẬT qua Web Audio: oscillator → lowpass → VCA → master gain ~0.22 → compressor, envelope vào ra mượt không tách tiếng, LFO điều biến cao độ. Chơi phím bằng chuột hoặc QWERTY (a,s,d,f… phím trắng, w,e,t,y… phím đen); kéo núm lên xuống để quét cutoff/reso; bấm SAW hoặc SQUARE để đổi dạng sóng. AudioContext chỉ tạo khi có thao tác đầu tiên. Bản chụp là demo lặp IM LẶNG: một đoạn riff ngũ cung thứ seed tự chơi — phím lún theo trình tự với portamento, ánh sáng cutoff quét qua, scope ngọ nguậy — là hàm thuần của u nên loop liền mạch. Frame 0 ở giữa riff với một phím đang nhấn.
notes: Mở ra bấm phím hoặc nhấn a,s,d… để nghe synth đơn âm; render(u) chạy riff ngũ cung seed (phím lún + cutoff quét + scope), demo im lặng loop liền mạch.
